items.name_cn:
Genuine Leather
L❤ewe Mini Classic Calfskin Hammock Hobo Bag "Olive"
The Hammock Hobo deconstructs the design of a classic bag that easily changes shape, retaining the iconic hammock silhouette to create a stylish, versatile, and ergonomic hobo bag. This mini version is crafted from classic calfskin, with a knotted calfskin strap for a personalized touch.
Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld
Zipper closure
Calfskin zipper pull
Herringbone cotton canvas lining
Anagram dice
Model: 1301
Size: 28×17×9.5cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Crossbody bag Light Blue
Loє❤️wє New Arrival, the ultimate crossbody bag!
A must-have for fashionistas to look cool when going out~
The viral Puzzle-derived puzzle hobo!
Once it appeared, it made many bag lovers want one
The puzzle hobo inherits the classic geometric bag shape
Overall more slim and slender
The wide shoulder strap looks more high-end and stylish
Great for both hand-carry and shoulder carry!
Don't let its size fool you
The softness of Nappa calfskin
Makes the bag lightweight and incredibly spacious
Super practical for daily wear, excellent!
size:29*12*10cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Small puzzle Tote Light Pear Brown
25.5-14.5-31.5 New 0.680 Model 1762
Glossy Calfskin Puzzle Fold
Inspired by the geometric lines of the brand's classic bags, the Puzzle Fold Bag reinterprets them with geometrically architectural appliqués. It folds completely, making it a perfect travel companion. The brand uses creative ingenuity to create a soft and lightweight bag, paired with a low-key and elegant LOEWE logo.
Suede lining
LOWEY gold stamping

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
1774 (Matching metal chain + 1 long shoulder strap) Eucalyptus Green
Soft Nappa Sheepskin Flamenco Purse
Large 30-10.5-20
The Flamenco Purse features a pleated design with key details like the signature knot on the side. Stylish and versatile, it can be carried as a clutch, worn with the donut chain shoulder strap, or slung over the shoulder with a leather strap. This version is made of soft Nappa sheepskin.
Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld
Removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap
Removable donut chain with Anagram embossed pebbled texture
Subtle magnetic closure
Suede lining
LOEWE gold or silver stamping

items.name_cn: /women's bag

Genuine leather
New
Model 1773 23-17-5.5 (includes extended leather shoulder strap)
Mini Nappa Lambskin Flamenco Clutch
The Flamenco Clutch, first released in the 1970s, features a drawstring closure and a signature twisted knot. The Flamenco Purse has been cleverly redesigned with a delicate knotted top and a soft, sensual draped silhouette. This version is crafted from soft Nappa lambskin.
Crossbody or shoulder carry
Detachable, adjustable shoulder strap
Subtle magnetic closure
Suede lining
LOEWE hot stamping
): Gold
Material: Lambskin
Weight: 0.2 kg

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Puzzle Edge
Bag Latest version with adjustable strap Burgundy
Lo*we🔥's debut tote*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technique create Puzzle's unique geometric lines*This mini version is made of satin calfskin with cage-stitched edges🌟
The mini Puzzle can hold a small vertical wallet, most smartphones (up to 6.1 inches), and a sunglasses case; worn on the shoulder or crossbody*Adjustable, detachable strap*Zipper closure, calfskin zipper pull*Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing🌟
size:18*12.5*8CM
model:3000b

items.name_cn:
Genuine leather
Small Classic Calfskin Puzzle Bag 3001B
24cm Burgundy strap sold separately
The Puzzle Bag is Jonathan Anderson's first tote for LOEWE. The rectangular shape and precise cutting technique create Puzzle's unique geometric lines. This small bag is made of classic calfskin with overlapping edges.
The small Puzzle bag can hold a large wallet, phone, and sunglasses
Shoulder, crossbody, hand, or clutch carry
Detachable, adjustable strap
Zipper closure with calfskin pull
External zip pocket and internal slip pocket
Customizable with straps and personalized charms
Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing
